name: Best Ever Chocolate Pudding Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Spray an 8-inch square baking pan with cooking spray.
3. In a medium bowl, cream butter and sugar until smooth.
4. Add one egg yolk and vanilla; beat at medium speed until light and fluffy.
5. Gradually add flour and salt, beating on low speed just until combined.
6. Pour dough into prepared baking pan and chill for 30 minutes.
7. Press the chilled dough evenly onto the bottom and sides of the pan to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
8. Extend the dough up over the sides of the pan by 1 inch, then return it to the refrigerator to chill again for 30 minutes.
9. For the filling: In a small bowl, mix together sugar and cornstarch until combined.
10. With an electric mixer on medium high speed, beat egg yolks until light and fluffy.
11. Gradually add the sugar-cornstarch mixture; continue beating at medium-high until fully incorporated.
12. Add vanilla, cream, chocolate, and walnuts; blend in using low speed, scraping the bowl as needed until smooth.
13. Pour the filling over the crust into the baking pan.
14. Bake for 1 hour or until set and golden brown.
15. Remove from oven and let cool completely before cutting into bars.
